title: selaginella davidi
intro: Selaginella davidi is a type of evergreen perennial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family, commonly known as spikemoss or resurection plant due to its ability to revive after drying out. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Selaginella davidi include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used to treat various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
